name: Quick Strike
description: A swift, basic attack that deals minor physical damage. Generates a small amount of combo points.
card_image_description: A simple, worn leather border. The center shows a blurred, silver streak representing the rapid movement of a dagger or shortsword.

name: Aimed Shot
description: A carefully aimed shot that deals moderate damage. Requires a bow or crossbow.
card_image_description: A border of polished yew wood, wrapped with bowstring. The image is a first-person view, looking down the shaft of an arrow at a distant target.

name: Heavy Blow
description: A powerful, telegraphed strike that deals high physical damage. Requires a two-handed weapon.
card_image_description: A thick, dented iron border. The center depicts a massive warhammer just before impact, with lines of force gathering around its head.

name: Hamstring
description: Cripples the target, reducing their movement speed by 50% for 8 seconds and dealing minor damage.
card_image_description: A border of stitched, rough leather. The image shows a close-up of a blade cutting across the back of a creature's leg, with a red icon indicating slowness.

name: Parry
description: Enter a defensive stance for 3 seconds. If you are hit by a melee attack, you parry it, taking no damage and enabling a free, empowered counter-attack.
card_image_description: A border designed like the crossguard of a sword, made of polished steel. The center shows two blades crossed, with a bright flash of sparks at their intersection.

name: Cleave
description: A sweeping attack that strikes your primary target and one additional enemy in front of you.
card_image_description: A wide, sharpened steel border. The image shows a warrior swinging a large axe in a wide, horizontal arc, with the white blur of the weapon connecting with two enemy silhouettes.

name: Serpent Sting
description: Fires a venom-tipped arrow that deals minor initial damage and poisons the target, dealing nature damage over 15 seconds.
card_image_description: A border with a green, snakeskin texture. The center shows an arrow in flight, its arrowhead glowing with a sickly green venom that drips off in its wake.

name: Eviscerate
description: A vicious finishing move that consumes all combo points to deal massive damage to a single target.
card_image_description: A dark steel border, stained with crimson. The image depicts two daggers being brutally plunged into a target, with a visceral red slash effect.

name: Multi-Shot
description: Fires a spray of arrows in a cone, hitting up to 3 targets. Requires a bow or crossbow.
card_image_description: A border decorated with arrow fletching patterns. The center shows three arrows being fired from a single bow, fanning out to hit multiple targets.

name: Sundering Smash
description: A devastating overhead blow that shatters armor, reducing the target's physical defense by 20% for 10 seconds.
card_image_description: A border of cracked and broken iron plates. The image shows a massive maul crashing down on a metal shield, causing it to shatter into pieces.

name: Battle Trance
description: Enter a focused state. Your critical strike chance is increased by 15%, but your armor is reduced by 10%.
card_image_description: A border of swirling, red and black energy. The center shows the silhouette of a warrior, with their eyes glowing with a sharp, focused, crimson light.

name: Disarm
description: Knocks the weapon from an enemy's hands, drastically reducing their damage dealt for 6 seconds.
card_image_description: A border made of broken chain links. The central image is of a sword being knocked from a gauntleted hand, spinning through the air.

name: Blade Dance
description: Unleash a flurry of strikes, hitting all nearby enemies 3 times over 2 seconds. Also grants 50% dodge chance for the duration.
card_image_description: An elegant border of curved, razor-sharp steel blades. The center depicts a warrior as a whirlwind of motion, surrounded by a storm of silver slash marks.

name: Pinning Shot
description: Fires a heavy bolt that pins an enemy to the ground, rooting them for 4 seconds.
card_image_description: A heavy iron-banded wood border, like a siege crossbow. The image shows a thick, heavy bolt piercing a creature's shadow and pinning it firmly to the rocky ground.

name: Executioner's Chop
description: A brutal attack that can only be used on targets below 25% health, dealing massive damage.
card_image_description: A grim, dark iron border adorned with skulls and chains. The center shows the massive, shadowed blade of an executioner's axe raised high, ready for the final, devastating chop.

name: Volley
description: Rains arrows down on a target area for 5 seconds, dealing continuous damage to all enemies within it.
card_image_description: A border resembling a stone castle battlement. The image shows a sky darkened by a massive, unending shower of arrows falling onto a targeted circle on the ground.

name: Coup de Grâce
description: Find a fatal flaw in the enemy's defense. Your next direct damage ability is a guaranteed critical strike.
card_image_description: An ornate border of black steel and silver filigree. The center shows a heavily armored knight with a single, glowing red weak point exposed on their chest.

name: Earthshatter
description: Slams a two-handed weapon into the ground, sending a shockwave that damages and stuns all enemies in a frontal cone for 3 seconds.
card_image_description: A monumental border of shattered rock and earth. The image shows a warrior slamming a colossal hammer into the ground, causing a powerful, cone-shaped shockwave of rock and dust to erupt forward.

name: Kill Shot
description: An instant, high-damage shot that can only be used on enemies below 20% health.
card_image_description: A border of cold, dark metal styled like a rifle's scope. The center is the view through the scope, with red crosshairs centered on the head of a huge, wounded beast.

name: Storm of a Thousand Cuts
description: The ultimate martial technique. Unleashes a blindingly fast series of strikes against a single target, dealing catastrophic damage over 5 seconds. You are immune to crowd control while channeling.
card_image_description: A legendary border of masterwork Damascus steel, wrapped in crimson silk. The center shows a single enemy being overwhelmed by a storm of countless, impossibly fast sword strikes, appearing as a cage of silver light.
